sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">Fr. = Fragmenta.</title_> <title_ TEIform="title">Dith.Oxy. = Dithyrambi,</title_> in <title_ TEIform="title">POxy.</title_> 1604. <title_ TEIform="title">Pae., Parth. = Paeanes, Parthenia,</title_> ed. E. Diehl, <title_ TEIform="title">Supp. Lyr.</title_>3 p. 52. Scholia, ed A. Boeckh, in editione Pindari, Berlin 1811-21; Scholia Vetera, ed. A. B. Drachmann, Leipzig (T.) 1903, 1910.</item>
